title: About Us
content: We are a passionate team building the future of shopping using cutting-edge AI and blockchain technology to disrupt the e-commerce industry and revolutionize how people buy things online and offline in a synergistic omnichannel way.

title: Our App
content: NovaShop is an app. It has a feed. Users scroll the feed. They see products. They can buy products. The app is very modern and uses AI for everything including recommendations, chat, search, and checkout, making it the most advanced shopping experience ever created.

title: Why Now
content: E-commerce is growing. Everyone uses their phone. AI is the future. Blockchain is also the future. We are positioned at the intersection of these massive trends to capture the opportunity ahead of competitors.

title: Market
content: The global e-commerce market is worth $6 trillion.

title: Business Model
content: We will figure out monetization once we have enough users. Possible options include ads, subscriptions, or a marketplace fee, to be decided later.

title: Traction
content: We launched a landing page and got 200 email signups.

title: Team
content: Founder 1 - CEO. Founder 2 - CTO. Both very passionate about technology and shopping.

title: The Future
content: In five years we see NovaShop as the default way the world shops, expanding into groceries, travel, finance, and eventually becoming a super-app for everything, similar to how WeChat dominates in China.
